name: Pairing Screen — initial load displays pairing code and countdown timer

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://onenotify-7593c.web.app and wait for the page to fully render.
The page title is 'Notified Web Portal' and the main header heading displays 'Pair Web Companion'.
The instruction list showing step numbers '1', '2', and '3' is clearly rendered on the page.
A 6-digit numeric pairing code container is displayed along with a countdown timer containing the text 'Expires in' (for example 'Expires in 9m').
